name: Cubbison's Caesar Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Head Romaine lettuce, washed and chilled
4 to 6 Anchovy fillets, cut into bits (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear lettuce into bite-sized pieces and place into a large bowl.
2. Combine olive oil and minced garlic in a small bowl.
3. Toss with the lettuce until evenly coated.
4. Immerse egg in boiling water for exactly 1 minute.
5. Remove egg from boiling water using tongs and break over salad.
6. Sprinkle with lemon juice, red wine vinegar, and Worcestershire sauce.
7. Toss well to combine.
8. Add anchovies (if desired), grated Parmesan cheese, freshly ground black pepper, and croutons.
9. Gently toss until evenly mixed.
10. Serve immediately.
Note: For egg-safe Caesar salad, omit the egg or use 3 tablespoons of egg substitute (1 egg white combined with the 2 tablespoons lemon juice) chilled for 48 hours before using. Alternatively, use a hard-cooked egg and puree it with the dressing ingredients in a blender or food processor, adding an additional 2 tablespoons of olive oil.
Options: Add grilled chicken breast cut into slices, small cooked shrimp, or sliced oil-packed sun-dried tomatoes.
